div.div:
带有更多片段的 URL 模板。
如："a/b/c/d" 比"a/b/c" 优先级高。

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 718px; height: 1px; padding-top: 461px; margin-left: 263px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #4D4D4D;
display: inline-block; font-size: 20px; font-family: Helvetica; color: #4D4D4D; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.font: URL 模板中的字面文本优先级高于参数段。
如："a/b" 比"a/{parameter}" 具有更高的优先级。

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 718px; height: 1px; padding-top: 581px; margin-left: 263px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #4D4D4D;
display: inline-block; font-size: 20px; font-family: Helvetica; color: #4D4D4D; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.font: 具有参数约束的 URL 模板比没有参数约束的参数段具有更高的优先级。
如："a/{b:int}" 比"a/{b}" 具有更高的优先级。

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 718px; height: 1px; padding-top: 701px; margin-left: 263px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #4D4D4D;
display: inline-block; font-size: 20px; font-family: Helvetica; color: #4D4D4D; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.font: 如："a/{b}" 比"a/**" 优先级更高。

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 398px; height: 1px; padding-top: 241px; margin-left: 582px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #4D4D4D;
display: inline-block; font-size: 18px; font-family: Helvetica; color: #4D4D4D; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: 注：顶部具有最高优先级(将首先进行评估)
